analysis: The project is a test-website focused on black holes. The current theme needs to be enhanced with a cosmic, dark theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements. The existing files show some incomplete sections and missing functionalities related to black holes. The CSS file needs to be completed with the full intended dark, cosmic theme, and the JavaScript file needs to be updated with proper event handlers and functionality for the black hole theme.

improvements.description: Complete the CSS file with the full intended dark, cosmic theme including animations for black hole visuals, swirling effects, and glowing elements.
Complete the HTML content to ensure all sections are properly included, such as the main content area with interactive planets, animated slides, and other sections related to black holes.
Update the JavaScript file with proper event handlers and functionality for the black hole theme, including animations and interactive elements.
